pi_items.source: Web search results confirm: Wikipedia, ResearchGate, statnet/statnet.data repository all document this as a real dataset from Wayne W. Zachary's 1970-1972 study

privileged_info_summary: The implement_graph_algorithms task uses the real Zachary's Karate Club dataset, a well-known social network with 34 nodes and 78 edges from Wayne W. Zachary's 1977 paper. The project directory is /home/ga/IdeaProjects/graph-algorithms with Java source in src/main/java/graph/GraphAlgorithms.java and tests in src/test/java/graph/GraphAlgorithmsTest.java. The task requires implementing 5 graph algorithms (BFS, DFS, Dijkstra, cycle detection, and connected components) that must pass 16 unit tests using JUnit 4.13.2 on Java 17. The karate club data is loaded from src/test/resources/karate_club.edges and is the authentic dataset used in graph clustering research.
